allow_parent_close_when: every source deliverable row has current_evidence_status=fresh-rch-pass or an explicit blocked follow-up
every proof command starts with the remote-required RCH prefix
every Cargo proof command includes CARGO_TARGET_DIR
the channel MPSC/select public execution lane is not widened into cfg(test) proof
no transcript contains a local fallback marker
no focused artifact contract is cited as release readiness or broad workspace health
block_parent_close_when: any source deliverable row is rerun-required without a fresh RCH receipt
any stale-progress receipt is cited as source failure
any compile-only lane is cited as test execution
any exact-filter Cargo lane reports zero tests
any broad release, performance, workspace-health, or RCH-fleet claim appears

failure_fixtures.mutation: cite compile-only lane as test execution
failure_fixtures.expected_reason: compile-only evidence cannot prove test execution

failure_fixtures.mutation: replace no-claim boundary with release-readiness claim
failure_fixtures.expected_reason: focused signoff cannot prove release readiness

current_operator_report.summary: The validation-frontier signoff packet maps inventory, stale-progress receipts, downstream-consumer proof, graph budgets, manifest/status rows, and the channel MPSC/select fixture into one operator procedure. Parent close remains blocked until the exact remote-required lanes are rerun with fresh evidence or explicit blocked follow-ups. This packet is not release readiness, broad workspace health, performance evidence, source-correctness evidence outside cited surfaces, or live RCH fleet proof.

markdown_summary_golden:
# Validation Frontier final signoff

final_verdict=rerun_required_before_parent_close
parent_close_allowed=false
first_failing_row=validation-frontier-inventory
freshness_window_seconds=86400

- owner_bead=asupersync-validation-frontier-v2-b5cjsv.1 proof_command_id=validation-frontier-inventory-contract evidence_status=rerun-required
- owner_bead=asupersync-validation-frontier-v2-b5cjsv.4 proof_command_id=rch-stale-progress-receipt-contract evidence_status=rerun-required
- owner_bead=asupersync-validation-frontier-v2-b5cjsv.5 proof_command_id=downstream-consumer-proof-contract evidence_status=rerun-required
- owner_bead=asupersync-validation-frontier-v2-b5cjsv.6 proof_command_id=validation-frontier-graph-budgets-contract evidence_status=rerun-required
non_claims: does not prove broad workspace health
does not prove source correctness outside cited surfaces
does not prove live RCH fleet availability
does not authorize local Cargo fallback
does not close the parent validation-frontier epic
